SYS-02 // eSIMRECONAI
eSimReconAI

SYSTEM — ONLINE
UNCLASSIFIED
SYS-01 // NES EXECUTIVE INTELLIGENCE
NES AI
NAVY ENERGY SYSTEM
Select a module to launch
SYS-01A // AI ANALYTICS
An executive analytics platform for NES energy data — AI-generated insights, anomaly detection, regional performance scoring, and drill-down reporting across all Navy installations.

Connect to CAPRA or STARK AI providers for live analysis, audit logs, and data validation before IEPS loading.
Command Tab Drill-Down AI Report Builder Audit Log CAPRA / STARK
SYS-01B // AI MANPOWER
A cinematic slide briefing covering four active workforce modules — NES manpower management, new user onboarding & certification (iNED + 15-question cert exam), data verification with a mock IEPS interface, and reporting & performance analytics.

Includes an AI-generated review of 6 unresolved issues: ownership gaps, measurement definitions, certification governance, data validation coverage, and timeline risks.
NDW Priority 12 Slides
eSIMRECONAI
SYS-02 // eSIMRECONAI
eSRA AI
eSIMRECONAI
Select a module to launch
SYS-02A // SIMULATOR
Scenario Simulator
A 7-phase scenario simulation of a grid failure at a major military installation — mapping, criticality tagging, outage trigger, backup activation, and resource depletion.

Choose a scenario: NB San Diego (utility outage) or NS Norfolk (hurricane).
7 Phases Live Map Warning Orders
SYS-02B // E-RECON
e-Recon Panel
Live installation intelligence panel — real-time recon of military base energy posture, sensor feeds, and geospatial status via TomTom map integration.

Displays site-level telemetry, grid status overlays, and installation health across monitored nodes.
TomTom Map Live Telemetry Geo Intel
SYS-02C // DATA DROP ZONE
Data Drop Zone
Secure data ingest portal — structured upload zone for NOAA weather archives, DoD logistics files, and raw sensor exports feeding eSimReconAI analysis.

Supports XLSX, CSV, JSON with auto-classification on ingest.
XLSX / CSV JSON Auto-Classify
SYS-02D // SAVED
Saved Scenarios & Recon Sites
Persistent session library — saved scenario configurations, bookmarked recon sites, and exported post-mortem reports.

Reload any prior simulation or recon site snapshot directly into the active wargame or e-Recon panel.
Scenarios Recon Sites Reports
